languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Значит, вы пришли. Это хорошо — я лично покажу вам, что творится в этом гнусном месте". {n}Лицо человека мелко подрагивает, будто в бесконечном тике. Место соединения импланта с головой покраснело и сочится сукровицей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан! Значит, вы пришли. Это хорошо — я лично покажу вам, что творится в этом гадком месте". {n}Лицо человека мелко подрагивает, будто в бесконечном тике. Место соединения импланта с головой покраснело и сочится сукровицей.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Значит, вы пришли. Это хорошо — я лично покажу вам, что творится в этом гнусном месте". {n}Лицо человека мелко подрагивает, будто в бесконечном тике. Место соединения импланта с головой покраснело и сочится сукровицей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That is good. I will personally show you what is going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in an endlessly repeating tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

"Lord Captain! There you are. That is good. I will personally show you what is going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in an endlessly repeating tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

"Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

"Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Da seid Ihr ja. Das ist gut. Ich werde Euch zeigen, was an diesem verfluchten Ort vor sich geht." {n}Das Gesicht des Mannes zuckt leicht, als hätte er einen Tick. Die Stelle, an der das Implantat mit seinem Kopf verbunden ist, hat sich rot gefärbt und eitert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Da seid Ihr ja. Das ist gut. Ich werde Euch zeigen, was an diesem verfluchten Ort vor sich geht." {n}Das Gesicht des Mannes zuckt leicht, als hätte er einen Tick. Die Stelle, an der das Implantat mit seinem Kopf verbunden ist, hat sich rot gefärbt und eitert.{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous voilà. Excellent. Je vais vous montrer les infamies qui ont été commises ici. » {n}Le visage de l'homme se contracte légèrement, comme sous l'effet d'un tic persistant. La zone où l'implant est fixé à son crâne est rouge et suinte du pus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous voilà. Excellent. Je vais vous montrer les infamies qui ont été commises ici. » {n}Le visage de l'homme se contracte légèrement, comme sous l'effet d'un tic persistant. La zone où l'implant est fixé à son crâne est rouge et suinte du pus.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人！您来了。太好了。我就是要让您看看，这鬼地方都在搞什么名堂。”{n}那人的脸轻微抽动着，仿佛患有顽固的抽搐症一般。他头部与植入物连接的区域一片红肿，正往外渗着脓水。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！您来了。太好了。我就是要让您看看，这鬼地方都在搞什么名堂。”{n}那人的脸轻微抽动着，仿佛患有顽固的抽搐症一般。他头部与植入物连接的区域一片红肿，正往外渗着脓水。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Ahí está. Estupendo. Así podré enseñarle personalmente qué sucede en este lugar miserable». {n}La cara del hombre se tuerce como si tuviera un tic constante. La zona donde el implante se conecta a su cabeza está roja y rezuma pus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That's good. I will show you myself what's going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if with a persistent tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Ahí está. Estupendo. Así podré enseñarle personalmente qué sucede en este lugar miserable». {n}La cara del hombre se tuerce como si tuviera un tic constante. La zona donde el implante se conecta a su cabeza está roja y rezuma pus.{/n}

languages.text: 「キャプテン閣下！ここにいたのか。それはよかった。この下劣な場所で何が起こっているのか、私が直接お見せしましょう"{n}男の顔が、まるで終わりのないチックを繰り返すかのように、わずかに痙攣する。インプラントが頭とつながっている部分が赤くなり、膿がにじんでいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! There you are. That is good. I will personally show you what is going on in this vile place." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in an endlessly repeating tic. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing pus.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Buradasınız. Bu iyi. Bu iğrenç yerde neler döndüğünü size kendim göstereceğim." {n}Adamın yüzü hafifçe, sanki kalıcı bir tik varmış gibi seğiriyor. İmplantın kafasına bağlandığı bölge kızarmış ve irin sızdırıyor.{/n}
